060713.cherokee: ᏥᎪᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᎯᎯᏉ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ.  ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏍᎩᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ, ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎩ ᎠᎩᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
060713.english: Was then that which is good made death unto me? God forbid. But sin, that it might appear sin, working death in me by that which is good; that sin by the commandment might become exceeding sinful.
060713.phonetic: Tsi-go-no na-s-gi na o-s-dv ge-sv a-gi-hi-hi-quo nu-li-s-ta-ne-i?  gv-wa-tli-s-di.  A-s-ga-ni-s-gi-ni, na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi nu-s-dv a-s-ga-ni, du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-gi a-gi-hi-s-di-yi gv-di-s-gv-gi na-s-gi na o-s-dv ge-sv-i; na-s-gi a-s-ga-ni u-li-ne-tsv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv u-tsa-ti a-s-ga-na-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

060714.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᏆᏘᏂᏙᎯ, ᎥᎩᎾᏗᏅᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎠᎩᎾᏢᏗᏱ.
060714.english: For we know that the law is spiritual: but I am carnal, sold under sin.
060714.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-da-nv-do u-tlo-yi ge-sv-i; a-yv-s-gi-ni u-que-da-li a-qua-ti-ni-do-hi, v-gi-na-di-nv-dv a-s-ga-ni a-gi-na-tlv-di-yi.

060715.cherokee: ᏄᏍᏛᏰᏃ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏯᎩᏰᎸᎭ; ᏄᏍᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᏛᏁᎰᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏂᏆᏘᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
060715.english: For that which I do I allow not: for what I would, that do I not; but what I hate, that do I.
060715.phonetic: Nu-s-dv-ye-no da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, v-tla o-si-yu ya-gi-ye-lv-ha; nu-s-dv-s-gi-ni a-qua-du-li-s-gv-i v-tla na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ho-i; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni tsi-ni-qua-ti-hv-i, na-s-gi ni-ga-dv-ne-ho-i.

060716.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳ ᎾᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᏛᏁᎭ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎢᏳᎲᏍᎦ.
060716.english: If then I do that which I would not, I consent unto the law that it is good.
060716.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu na-qua-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ha, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di o-si-yu ge-sv go-i-yu-hv-s-ga.

060717.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᏛᏁᎭ, ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎩᏯᎠ.
060717.english: Now then it is no more I that do it, but sin that dwelleth in me.
060717.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di v-tla hna-quo a-yv na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ha, a-s-ga-ni-s-gi-ni na-s-gi tsa-gi-ya-a.

060718.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒᎢ, (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᏯᏛᏅ,) ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏄᎵᏠᏯᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏚᎸᏗᏱᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏩᏘᎭ.
060718.english: For I know that in me (that is, in my flesh,) dwelleth no good thing: for to will is present with me; but how to perform that which is good I find not.
060718.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi a-yv ge-sv-i, (na-s-gi a-gi-que-da-lv ya-dv-nv,) go-hu-s-di o-s-dv nu-li-tlo-ya-s-dv-na ge-sv-i; a-du-lv-di-yi-ye-no a-gi-ha; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na o-s-dv ge-sv i-ya-dv-ne-di-yi v-tla yi-tsi-wa-ti-ha.

060719.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛᏰᏃ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᏛᏁᎰᎢ; ᎤᏲᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
060719.english: For the good that I would I do not: but the evil which I would not, that I do.
060719.phonetic: O-s-dv-ye-no i-ya-dv-ne-di-yi a-qua-du-li-s-gv-i, v-tla na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ho-i; u-yo-s-gi-ni na-s-gi na-qua-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ni-ga-dv-ne-ho-i.

060720.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᏛᏁᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᎦᏛᏁᎭ, ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎩᏯᎠ.
060720.english: Now if I do that I would not, it is no more I that do it, but sin that dwelleth in me.
060720.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu-no a-yv na-qua-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ha, v-tla a-yv hna-quo na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-ga-dv-ne-ha, a-s-ga-ni-s-gi-ni na-s-gi tsa-gi-ya-a.

060721.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏉ ᏥᏩᏘᎭ ᎯᎠ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏚᎸ, ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎩᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎰᎢ.
060721.english: I find then a law, that, when I would do good, evil is present with me.
060721.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na-quo tsi-wa-ti-ha hi-a di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, na-s-gi o-s-dv i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi a-qua-du-lv, u-yo ge-sv da-gi-ka-hna-wa-di-do-ho-i.

060722.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎬᏗᎭ ᎭᏫᏂ ᎠᏇᎲ ᏴᏫ.
060722.english: For I delight in the law of God after the inward man:
060722.phonetic: O-si-yu-ye-no a-gi-ye-lv-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga gv-di-ha ha-wi-ni a-que-hv yv-wi.

060723.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏥᏰᎸ ᎠᏆᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᏘᎴᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ ᎠᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏴᎩ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᎯ ᎠᏊᏓᎸᎥᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏰᎸ ᎠᏆᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᎠᎲᎢ.
060723.english: But I see another law in my members, warring against the law of my mind, and bringing me into captivity to the law of sin which is in my members.
060723.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha nv-wa-da-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di tsi-ye-lv a-qua-du-da-de-wi-sv-i, na-s-gi di-ga-ti-le-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-qua-da-nv-do-gi-hi a-hv-i, a-le tsi-yv-gi i-ya-quv-ne-hi a-quu-da-lv-v-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi a-s-ga-ni u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi tsi-ye-lv a-qua-du-da-de-wi-sv a-hv-i.

060724.cherokee: ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ ᎾᏆᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ!  ᎦᎪ ᏛᏊᏓᎴᏏ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏰᎸ ᎠᏓᎯᎯ ᎠᏆᏚᏓᎸᏛᎢ.
060724.english: O wretched man that I am! who shall deliver me from the body of this death?
060724.phonetic: U-yo-s-dv-quo na-qua-s-di a-yv!  ga-go dv-quu-da-le-si hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ye-lv a-da-hi-hi a-qua-du-da-lv-dv-i.

060725.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ ᎬᏗᎭ, ᎠᏴᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏕᏥᎦᎾᏩᏕᎦ, ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏕᏥᎦᎿᎭᏩᏕᎦ.
060725.english: I thank God through Jesus Christ our Lord. So then with the mind I myself serve the law of God; but with the flesh the law of sin.
060725.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-ya-li-e-li-tse-ha Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.  Na-s-gi-no a-qua-da-nv-te-di-yi gv-di-ha, a-yv-quo na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li de-tsi-ga-na-wa-de-ga, a-gi-que-da-lv-s-gi-ni ge-sv gv-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-s-ga-ni u-tse-li de-tsi-ga-hna-wa-de-ga.

060801.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏩᎭ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏩᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᎬᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᏣᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᎦ.
060801.english: There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in Christ Jesus, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.
060801.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla hna-quo wa-ha di-gv-wa-na-du-go-da-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi na Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-wa-ya-i, na-s-gi u-que-da-li ge-sv na-ni-s-da-wa-de-gv-na tsi-gi, a-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni tsa-ni-s-da-wa-de-ga.

060802.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏊᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏚᏓᎸᎢ.
060802.english: For the law of the Spirit of life in Christ Jesus hath made me free from the law of sin and death.
060802.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-ye-no gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, na-s-gi A-da-nv-do u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-quu-da-le-sv a-s-ga-ni a-le a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv u-na-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi a-qua-du-da-lv-i.

060803.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ,^ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏧᏅᏎ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏧᎬᏩᎴᎢ, ᏚᏭᎪᏓᏁᎴ ᎤᏎᎪᎩᏎ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎠᏯᎥᎢ;
060803.english: For what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, God sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh:
060803.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv a-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu ge-sv u-que-da-li i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv,^ U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wa-sv U-we-tsi tsu-nv-se na-s-gi-ya di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi a-s-ga-na u-que-da-li, a-le a-s-ga-ni tsu-gv-wa-le-i, du-wu-go-da-ne-le u-se-go-gi-se a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-que-da-lv a-ya-v-i;

060804.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᎦᏛᏁᎰᎲᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏴ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ.
060804.english: That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.
060804.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-do-di-yi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv na-s-gi-ya du-yu-go-dv i-ga-dv-ne-ho-hv-s-di-yi, a-yv u-que-da-li ge-sv i-di-s-da-wa-de-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni i-di-s-da-wa-de-gi.

060805.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏧᎾᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎤᎾᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏧᎾᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎤᎾᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᎢ.
060805.english: For they that are after the flesh do mind the things of the flesh; but they that are after the Spirit the things of the Spirit.
060805.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no u-que-da-li tsu-na-ti-ni-do-hi u-que-da-li-quo u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li u-na-ga-sa-ya-s-do-i, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na A-da-nv-do tsu-na-ti-ni-do-hi A-da-nv-do-quo u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li u-na-ga-sa-ya-s-do-i.

060806.cherokee: ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᎭ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏕᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᎭ.
060806.english: For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace.
060806.phonetic: U-que-da-li-ye-no a-ga-sa-ya-s-do-di-yi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-ha; a-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni a-de-sa-ya-s-do-di-yi gv-ni-dv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv di-ge-sv wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-ha.

060807.cherokee: ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎦᏘᎴᎩ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎩᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏅᎬᏛᎦ;
060807.english: Because the carnal mind is enmity against God: for it is not subject to the law of God, neither indeed can be.
060807.phonetic: U-que-da-li-ye-no a-ga-sa-ya-s-do-di-yi ge-sv na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ga-ti-le-gi; v-tla-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-de-gi yi-gi, v-tla a-le u-do-gi-yu-hi na-s-gi ye-li yi-nv-gv-dv-ga;

060808.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏧᎾᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᏱᏅᎬᎾᏛᎦ.
060808.english: So then they that are in the flesh cannot please God.
060808.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-que-da-li tsu-na-ti-ni-do-hi ge-sv v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di yi-nv-gv-na-dv-ga.

060809.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏗᏣᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏣᏘᏂᏙᎯ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏱᏥᏯᎠ.  ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᎩᎶ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏄᏪᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎥᏝ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎤᏤᎵ ᏱᎦᎩ.
060809.english: But ye are not in the flesh, but in the Spirit, if so be that the Spirit of God dwell in you. Now if any man have not the Spirit of Christ, he is none of his.
060809.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni v-tla u-que-da-li di-tsa-ti-ni-do-hi yi-gi, A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni di-tsa-ti-ni-do-hi, i-yu-no ho-wa U-ne-la-nv-hi U-da-nv-do yi-tsi-ya-a.  A-le i-yu gi-lo Ga-lo-ne-dv U-da-nv-do nu-we-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi na v-tla [Ga-lo-ne-dv] u-tse-li yi-ga-gi.

060810.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎠᏰᎸ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏃᏛ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
060810.english: And if Christ be in you, the body is dead because of sin; but the Spirit is life because of righteousness.
060810.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsi-ya-e-s-di, a-ye-lv u-do-hi-yu-hi u-yo-hu-sv-hi a-s-ga-ni nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni gv-no-dv du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

060811.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏧᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏧᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏙᏓᎬᏃᎯᏍᏔᏂ ᏗᏲᎱᏍᎩ ᏗᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᏓᎬᏔᏂ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᏯᎠ.
060811.english: But if the Spirit of him that raised up Jesus from the dead dwell in you, he that raised up Christ from the dead shall also quicken your mortal bodies by his Spirit that dwelleth in you.
060811.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni Tsi-sa u-yo-hu-sv tsu-le-ta-nv-hi U-da-nv-do i-tsi-ya-e-s-di, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-yo-hu-sv tsu-le-ta-nv-hi na-s-quo do-da-gv-no-hi-s-ta-ni di-yo-hu-s-gi di-tsi-ye-lv-i da-gv-ta-ni U-da-nv-do na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ya-a.

060812.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎡᎩᏚᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏱᎩᏚᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎢᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏕᎲᎢ.
060812.english: Therefore, brethren, we are debtors, not to the flesh, to live after the flesh.
060812.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-da-li-nv-tli, e-gi-du-ga, v-tla u-que-da-li yi-gi-du-ga, na-s-gi u-que-da-li i-gi-s-da-wa-di-da-s-di-yi i-de-hv-i.

060813.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᏙᏓᏥᏲᎱᏏ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎢᏥᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᏕᏨᏁᏍᏗ.
060813.english: For if ye live after the flesh, ye shall die: but if ye through the Spirit do mortify the deeds of the body, ye shall live.
060813.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no i-tse-hv u-que-da-li ge-sv i-tsi-s-da-wa-di-do-he-s-di, do-da-tsi-yo-hu-si; i-yu-s-gi-ni A-da-nv-do gv-di a-ye-lv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv i-tsi-hi-he-s-di, de-tsv-ne-s-di.

060814.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᎩᎶᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏧᎾᏘᏂᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ.
060814.english: For as many as are led by the Spirit of God, they are the sons of God.
060814.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no gi-lo-i U-ne-la-nv-hi U-da-nv-do tsu-na-ti-ni-do-hi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi.

060815.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎡᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏧᏪᏥᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏙ ᎡᏥᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎬ, ᎠᏆ!  ᎡᏙᏓ!  ᏥᏓᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
060815.english: For ye have not received the spirit of bondage again to fear; but ye have received the Spirit of adoption, whereby we cry, Abba, Father.
060815.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no A-da-nv-do a-tsi-na-tla-i ta-li-ne e-tsi-ne-lv-hi yi-gi, na-s-gi i-tsi-na-ye-hi-s-di-yi; tsu-we-tsi-s-gi-ni i-ge-gv-ne-lv-hi u-na-da-nv-do e-tsi-ne-lv, na-s-gi i-dv-di-s-gv, A-qua!  E-do-da!  tsi-da-di-s-go-i.

060816.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏓᎵᎪᏁᎭ ᏗᎦᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏅᏁᎲ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060816.english: The Spirit itself beareth witness with our spirit, that we are the children of God:
060816.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-ye-no u-wa-sv da-li-go-ne-ha di-ga-da-nv-do gv-ni-ge-sv na-nv-ne-hv, na-s-gi a-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi ge-sv-i.

060817.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᎦᏘᏰᎯ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ; ᎢᎦᏘᏰᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᎦᏘᏰᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᏱᎦᏠᏯᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎦᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
060817.english: And if children, then heirs; heirs of God, and joint-heirs with Christ; if so be that we suffer with him, that we may be also glorified together.
060817.phonetic: A-le i-yu tsu-we-tsi yi-gi, hna-quo i-ga-ti-ye-hi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di; i-ga-ti-ye-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsu-la-ha i-ga-ti-ye-di; i-yu-no ho-wa yi-ga-tlo-ya-s-di-ha a-gi-li-yo-gv-i, na-s-quo i-ga-tlo-ya-s-do-di ge-se-s-di a-tsi-lv-quo-di-s-gv-i.

060818.cherokee: ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎬᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060818.english: For I reckon that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which shall be revealed in us.
060818.phonetic: Ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-ye-no hi-a na-s-gi go-hi a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv v-tla di-gv-tli-lo-s-do-di yi-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv na-s-gi e-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-di ge-sv-i.

060819.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏘᏯ ᎨᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ.
060819.english: For the earnest expectation of the creature waiteth for the manifestation of the sons of God.
060819.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-dv-ye-no u-du-gi u-wa-sv a-ga-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv a-ga-ti-ya ge-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi.

060820.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏲᎩ ᎾᎬᏁᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎣᏏᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ, ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏮᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ,
060820.english: For the creature was made subject to vanity, not willingly, but by reason of him who hath subjected the same in hope,
060820.phonetic: A-ga-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no a-yo-gi na-gv-ne-le-i, v-tla o-si-yu u-ye-lv-sv i-yu-s-di, o-si-yu-s-gi-ni u-ye-lv-nv i-yu-s-di na-s-gi na na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi, u-du-gi u-wv-di-yi u-ye-lv-nv,

060821.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏲᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏝᎥᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏫᏗᎨᏥᎪᏗᏱ.
060821.english: Because the creature itself also shall be delivered from the bondage of corruption into the glorious liberty of the children of God.
060821.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-ga-ne-la-nv-hi u-wa-sv na-s-quo u-du-da-le-s-di-yi a-yo-gi ge-sv u-na-tla-v-i, ga-lv-quo-di-yu ni-di-ge-tsi-na-tla-v-na ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi u-na-tse-li-ga wi-di-ge-tsi-go-di-yi.

060822.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎨᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᏂᎵᏰᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ.
060822.english: For we know that the whole creation groaneth and travaileth in pain together until now.
060822.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi na-ni-v ge-ga-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv i-tsu-la-ha u-ni-li-ye-di-s-gv a-le a-ni-gi-li-yo-gv go-hi i-ya-s-di.

060823.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ, ᎢᎬᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ~ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏥᎨᎭ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎭᏫᏂ ᏕᎩᎵᏰᏗᎭ, ᎢᏗᎦᏘᏴ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏗᏰᎸ ᏧᎫᏴᏗᏱ ᏧᏭᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ.
060823.english: And not only they, but ourselves also, which have the firstfruits of the Spirit, even we ourselves groan within ourselves, waiting for the adoption, to wit, the redemption of our body.
060823.phonetic: V-tla a-le u-nv-sv-quo, i-gv-sv-s-gi-ni na-s-quo na-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ~a-da-nv-do tsi-ge-ha, a-yv na-s-quo i-gv-sv ge-sv ha-wi-ni de-gi-li-ye-di-ha, i-di-ga-ti-yv tsu-we-tsi i-ge-gv-ne-di, na-s-gi di-di-ye-lv tsu-gu-yv-di-yi tsu-wu-da-le-s-di-yi.

060824.cherokee: ᎤᏚᎩᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᎭ ᎡᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ; ᎤᏚᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏩᏒ ᎠᎪᎲᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏲᏩᏐᎢ; ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᏨᎪᏩᏘᏍᎪᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏱᎦᏲᏩᎭ?
060824.english: For we are saved by hope: but hope that is seen is not hope: for what a man seeth, why doth he yet hope for?
060824.phonetic: U-du-gi-quo-ye-no i-gv-ha e-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi; u-du-gi-s-gi-ni o-wa-sv a-go-hv-hi tsi-ge-so-i v-tla u-du-gi yo-wa-so-i; Go-hu-s-di-ye-no tsv-go-wa-ti-s-go-i, ga-do-no a-si u-du-gi yi-ga-yo-wa-ha?

060825.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎩᎪᎲᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏱᎬᎭ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏛᏂᏗᏳ ᎢᏗᎦᏘᏲ ᎾᏍᎩ.
060825.english: But if we hope for that we see not, then do we with patience wait for it.
060825.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni i-gi-go-hv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv u-du-gi yi-gv-ha, hna-quo di-dv-ni-di-yu i-di-ga-ti-yo na-s-gi.

060826.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᏗᏗᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᏔᏲᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏓᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏗᏰᏓᏁᎭ ᎤᎵᏰᏗᏍᎬ ᎬᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060826.english: Likewise the Spirit also helpeth our infirmities: for we know not what we should pray for as we ought: but the Spirit itself maketh intercession for us with groanings which cannot be uttered.
060826.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo A-da-nv-do i-gi-s-de-li-ha di-di-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu ge-sv-i; v-tla-ye-no yi-di-ga-ta-ha i-yu-s-di du-yu-go-dv ge-sv i-gi-ta-yo-s-di-yi i-da-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i; A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni u-wa-sv i-ga-li-s-di-ye-da-ne-ha u-li-ye-di-s-gv gv-di-ha na-s-gi ga-ne-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

060827.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎪᎵᏰᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏫ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᎵᏙᎲ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏓᎵᏍᏗᏰᏓᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060827.english: And he that searcheth the hearts knoweth what is the mind of the Spirit, because he maketh intercession for the saints according to the will of God.
060827.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi na di-go-li-ye-s-di tsu-na-wi a-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-li-do-hv A-da-nv-do nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di u-na-da-nv-ti da-li-s-di-ye-da-ne-hv na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i.

060828.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏚᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎲ ᎤᎾᏖᏆᎶᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎨᏳᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ.
060828.english: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose.
060828.phonetic: A-le i-di-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi ni-ga-v ni-du-li-s-ta-ni-do-hv u-na-te-qua-lo-sv o-s-dv i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di-yi du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ni-ge-yu-hi, na-s-gi na ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya u-da-nv-te-lv-i.

060829.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏥᏂᏓᎦᏔᎰᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᏚᏑᏰᏐ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.
060829.english: For whom he did foreknow, he also did predestinate to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brethren.
060829.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no ga-yu-la tsi-ni-da-ga-ta-ho-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo ni-du-su-ye-so U-we-tsi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi i-gv-yi e-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti a-na-li-nv-tli a-ne-hv-i.

060830.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏥᏂᏚᏑᏰᏐᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᏯᏅᎮᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏯᏅᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᏭᏓᎴᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏭᏓᎴᏛ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏂᏚᏩᏁᎴᎢ.
060830.english: Moreover whom he did predestinate, them he also called: and whom he called, them he also justified: and whom he justified, them he also glorified.
060830.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ga-yu-la tsi-ni-du-su-ye-so-i na-s-gi na-s-quo du-ya-nv-he-i; a-le na-s-gi tsu-ya-nv-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo du-wu-da-le-se-i; a-le na-s-gi tsu-wu-da-le-dv ge-sv, na-s-gi na-s-quo ga-lv-quo-di-yu ni-du-wa-ne-le-i.

060831.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ?  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏱᎩᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᎦᎪ ᏱᎦᏡᏓ?
060831.english: What shall we then say to these things? If God be for us, who can be against us?
060831.phonetic: Ga-do-no da-da-dv-ni hi-a na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di?  i-yu-no U-ne-la-nv-hi yi-gi-s-de-li-ha ga-go yi-ga-tlu-da?

060832.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏄᎨᏳᏅᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᏥᏚᏲᏎᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏴ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎩᏲᎯᏎᎲ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏗᎨᎩᏲᎯᏎᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ?
060832.english: He that spared not his own Son, but delivered him up for us all, how shall he not with him also freely give us all things?
060832.phonetic: Na-s-gi na nu-ge-yu-nv-na tsi-ge-se u-wa-sv U-we-tsi, tsi-du-yo-se-quo-s-gi-ni a-yv ni-di-v i-gi-s-de-li-s-gv-i, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da na-s-gi de-gi-yo-hi-se-hv a-se-quo di-ge-gi-yo-hi-se-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-ni-ga-li-s-da ni-ga-di-yu go-hu-s-di?

060833.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏙᏓᎫᎯᏍᏔᏂ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎯ ᏧᏑᏰᏛ?  ᏥᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏄᏓᎴᏍᎩ?
060833.english: Who shall lay any thing to the charge of God's elect? It is God that justifieth.
060833.phonetic: Ga-go u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv do-da-gu-hi-s-ta-ni U-na-le-nv-hi tsu-su-ye-dv?  tsi-go U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi u-nu-da-le-s-gi?

060834.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᏧᏄᎪᏓᏁᎯ?  ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎪ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎱᏎᎢ, ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏗᏏᏗᏢ ᏧᏬᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᎦᎵᏍᏗᏰᏓᏁᎭ?
060834.english: Who is he that condemneth? It is Christ that died, yea rather, that is risen again, who is even at the right hand of God, who also maketh intercession for us.
060834.phonetic: Ga-go tsu-nu-go-da-ne-hi?  Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-go, na-s-gi tsu-ni-hu-se-i, v-v, a-le na-s-quo na-s-gi tsi-du-le-hi-sa-nv, na-s-gi na-s-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-di-si-di-tlv tsu-wo-la, na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-ga-li-s-di-ye-da-ne-ha?

060835.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏅᏓᎬᏁᎵ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎩᎨᏒᎢ?  ᏥᎪ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏴᏓᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎪᏄᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ?
060835.english: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ? shall tribulation, or distress, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or peril, or sword?
060835.phonetic: Ga-go i-yv-dv nv-da-gv-ne-li Ga-lo-ne-dv i-gi-ge-sv-i?  tsi-go a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-we-li-hi-s-di a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-yo i-yv-da-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-da-go-nu-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le di-gi-ye-lv-ha ge-sv-i, a-le u-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv?

060836.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏙᎩᎢᎭ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ; ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾᏉ ᏗᎯᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᎩᏰᎸᎠ;
060836.english: As it is written, For thy sake we are killed all the day long; we are accounted as sheep for the slaughter.
060836.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Ni-hi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha do-gi-i-ha ni-go-hi-lv-i; u-ni-no-de-na-quo di-hi-s-di na-s-gi-ya o-gi-ye-lv-a;

060837.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏓᏓᏎᎪᎩᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
060837.english: Nay, in all these things we are more than conquerors through him that loved us.
060837.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv ge-sv i-da-da-se-go-gi-s-gi a-le u-tli i-ga-i, na-s-gi na i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

060838.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏰᏃ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏛᏂᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᏤᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏏ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ,
060838.english: For I am persuaded, that neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities, nor powers, nor things present, nor things to come,
060838.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-dv-ye-no a-quo-hi-yu-ha, na-s-gi v-tla a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-dv-ni-di-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi, a-le ge-tsi-lv-quo-di, a-le go-hu-s-di go-hi tse-ha, a-le go-hu-s-di a-si u-na-nu-go-i-s-di tsi-gi,

060839.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎭᏫᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏰᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ.
060839.english: Nor height, nor depth, nor any other creature, shall be able to separate us from the love of God, which is in Christ Jesus our Lord.
060839.phonetic: V-tla a-le ga-lv-la-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le ha-wi-ni-yu ge-sv-i, v-tla a-le nv-wa-da-le a-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv-i, ye-li i-yv-dv i-gv-wa-ne-di yi-ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi i-gi-ge-yu-sv-i, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi tsi-gi.

060901.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏥᏁᎦ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏥᎪᎥᏍᎦ, ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ,
060901.english: I say the truth in Christ, I lie not, my conscience also bearing me witness in the Holy Ghost,
060901.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya tsi-ne-ga Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ga-ta-hv-i, v-tla yi-ga-tsi-go-v-s-ga, a-qua-da-nv-dv na-s-quo a-quo-hi-yu-da-ne-hi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv,

060902.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᏲ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏒ ᎠᎩᎾᏫᏱ.
060902.english: That I have great heaviness and continual sorrow in my heart.
060902.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tsa-ti e-hi-s-di a-qua-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv a-le ni-go-hi-lv u-yo a-gi-ye-lv-sv a-gi-na-wi-yi.

060903.cherokee: ᎬᏆᏚᎸᏗᏉᏰᏃ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎥᎩᏍᎦᏨᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎥᏆᏓᏓᎴᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᎲᎢ ᎦᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬ ᎣᏣᏓᏅᏟ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᏋᏅ Ꭰ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ;
060903.english: For I could wish that myself were accursed from Christ for my brethren, my kinsmen according to the flesh:
060903.phonetic: Gv-qua-du-lv-di-quo-ye-no a-quv-sv ge-sv v-gi-s-ga-tsv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi v-qua-da-da-le-do-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv e-hv-i ga-tsi-s-de-li-s-gv o-tsa-da-nv-tli, go-hu-s-di di-quv-nv a u-que-da-li ge-sv-i;

060904.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᎩ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
060904.english: Who are Israelites; to whom pertaineth the adoption, and the glory, and the covenants, and the giving of the law, and the service of God, and the promises;
060904.phonetic: Na-s-gi I-si-li tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv tsi-gi; na-s-gi u-na-tse-li-ga tsi-gi [U-ne-la-nv-hi] tsu-we-tsi i-ge-gv-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i, a-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ge-tsi-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-du-i-s-do-di ge-sv-i;

060905.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏙᏓ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, Ꭰ ᎠᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎷᏤ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ.  ᎡᎹᏅ.
060905.english: Whose are the fathers, and of whom as concerning the flesh Christ came, who is over all, God blessed for ever. Amen.
060905.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsu-ni-do-da tsi-gi a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le na-s-gi a-ne-hv-i, a a-que-da-li ge-sv tsu-lu-tse Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-gi, nu-da-le-sv u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi, wi-na-s-dv-na ga-lv-quo-do-di.  E-ma-nv.

060906.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᏱᏥᏁᎦ,] ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ.
060906.english: Not as though the word of God hath taken none effect. For they are not all Israel, which are of Israel:
060906.phonetic: V-tla a-di-na U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv a-se-quo-quo tsi-nu-li-s-ta-no na-s-gi-ya [yi-tsi-ne-ga,] v-tla-ye-no ni-ga-dv I-si-li yi-gi na-s-gi I-si-li tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv tsi-gi.

060907.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ; ᎡᏏᎩᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎨᏥᏯᏅᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏣᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ.
060907.english: Neither, because they are the seed of Abraham, are they all children: but, In Isaac shall thy seed be called.
060907.phonetic: V-tla a-le E-qua-ha-mi tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv tsi-gi na-s-gi yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-ga-dv tsu-we-tsi yi-gi; E-si-gi-quo-s-gi-ni du-do-v ge-tsi-ya-nv-di-s-ge-s-di tsa-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi.

060908.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏯᏛᏅ, ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏧᏰᎸᏗ.
060908.english: That is, They which are the children of the flesh, these are not the children of God: but the children of the promise are counted for the seed.
060908.phonetic: Na-s-gi ya-dv-nv, U-que-da-li ge-sv u-na-de-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi hi-a v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi yi-gi; a-du-i-s-dv-s-gi-ni u-na-de-ta-nv-hi ge-sv na-s-gi tsu-we-tsi tsu-ye-lv-di.

060909.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᎢ.  ᎯᎠᏉ ᎢᏳ ᏓᏥᎷᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏎᎵ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎠᏧᏣ.
060909.english: For this is the word of promise, At this time will I come, and Sara shall have a son.
060909.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no nu-s-di u-li-ne-tsv a-du-i-s-dv-i.  Hi-a-quo i-yu da-tsi-lu-tsi, a-le Se-li da-ga-na-nu-go-wi-si a-tsu-tsa.

060910.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ; ᎵᏇᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏁᎵᏨ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏁᎵᏤᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎡᏏᎩ;
060910.english: And not only this; but when Rebecca also had conceived by one, even by our father Isaac;
060910.phonetic: V-tla a-le na-s-gi-quo yi-nu-s-di; Li-que-gi-s-gi-ni na-s-quo u-ne-li-tsv, na-s-gi a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-ne-li-tse-lv, na-s-gi i-gi-do-da E-si-gi;

060911.cherokee: ᏗᏂᏲᎵᏰᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎾᎾᏕᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎢ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏧᏑᏰᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏯᏂᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ;
060911.english: (For the children being not yet born, neither having done any good or evil, that the purpose of God according to election might stand, not of works, but of him that calleth;)
060911.phonetic: Di-ni-yo-li-ye-no a-si na-na-de-hv-s-gv-na ge-se-i, a-le a-si go-hu-s-di o-s-dv a-le u-yo-i na-na-dv-ne-hv-na ge-se-i, na-s-gi u-da-nv-te-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya tsu-su-ye-s-di ge-sv u-yo-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, v-tla du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya-s-gi-ni di-ya-ni-s-gi u-da-nv-te-lv-i;

060912.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏥᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏓᏂᎵᎨ ᏚᏁᎶᏕᏍᏗ ᎣᏂ ᎡᎯ;
060912.english: It was said unto her, The elder shall serve the younger.
060912.phonetic: hi-a na-tsi-we-se-le-i, U-da-ni-li-ge du-ne-lo-de-s-di o-ni e-hi;

060913.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏤᎦᏈ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏥᏰᎸᏅ, ᎢᏐᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏂᏆᏘᎸ.
060913.english: As it is written, Jacob have I loved, but Esau have I hated.
060913.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Tse-ga-qui o-si-yu tsi-ye-lv-nv, I-so-s-gi-ni tsi-ni-qua-ti-lv.

060914.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᏙ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ?  ᏥᎪ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏪᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ.
060914.english: What shall we say then? Is there unrighteousness with God? God forbid.
060914.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di ga-do da-da-dv-ni?  Tsi-go ni-du-yu-go-dv-na ge-sv u-we-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi?  Gv-wa-tli-s-di.

060915.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏥᏪᏎᎭ, ᏥᏯᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏯᏙᎵᎩ ᎨᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏥᏯᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏥᏯᏓᏅᏓᏓ ᎨᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
060915.english: For he saith to Moses, I will have mercy on whom I will have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I will have compassion.
060915.phonetic: O-si-ye-no hi-a na-tsi-we-se-ha, tsi-ya-do-li-s-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi na tsi-ya-do-li-gi ge-li-s-ge-s-di, a-le u-we-do-li-s-di tsi-ya-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi na u-we-do-li-s-di tsi-ya-da-nv-da-da ge-li-s-ge-s-di.

060916.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏚᎸᎲ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏍᏆᎸᏔᏅ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎤᎾᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᏙᎵᎩ ᏥᎩ.
060916.english: So then it is not of him that willeth, nor of him that runneth, but of God that sheweth mercy.
060916.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di v-tla gi-lo u-du-lv-hv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, v-tla a-le du-s-qua-lv-ta-nv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, U-na-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-da-nv-te-lv-i na-s-gi di-ga-do-li-gi tsi-gi.

060917.cherokee: ᎪᏪᎵᎯᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏥᏪᏎ ᏇᏓᏲ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏕᎬᏯᎴᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎯ ᎬᏴᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏧᏃᏣᎶᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᎢ.
060917.english: For the scripture saith unto Pharaoh, Even for this same purpose have I raised thee up, that I might shew my power in thee, and that my name might be declared throughout all the earth.
060917.phonetic: Go-we-li-hi-ye-no hi-a na-tsi-we-se Que-da-yo, na-s-gi hi-a nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha de-gv-ya-le-ta-nv, Na-s-gi a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi a-qua-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv ni-hi gv-yv-di-s-gv-i, a-le na-s-gi a-yv da-qua-do-v tsu-no-tsa-lo-i-s-di-yi e-lo-hi ni-gv-na-dv-i.

060918.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᏙᎵᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏯᏙᎵᎩ ᎡᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏍᏓᏱᏓ ᎡᎳ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
060918.english: Therefore hath he mercy on whom he will have mercy, and whom he will he hardeneth.
060918.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ga-do-li-go na-s-gi na tsi-ya-do-li-gi e-la, a-le gi-lo tsi-s-da-yi-da e-la a-s-da-yi-di-s-go-i.

060919.cherokee: ᎯᎠ Ꭷ ᎨᎵ ᏅᏛᏍᎩᏪᏎᎵ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎠᏰᎸᏍᎦ?  ᎦᎪᏰᏃ ᏚᎦᏘᎴᏅ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ?
060919.english: Thou wilt say then unto me, Why doth he yet find fault? For who hath resisted his will?
060919.phonetic: Hi-a ka ge-li nv-dv-s-gi-we-se-li, Ga-do-no a-si-quo e-s-ga a-ye-lv-s-ga?  ga-go-ye-no du-ga-ti-le-nv nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i?

060920.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎦᎪ ᎢᏣᏍᏗ ᏥᏁᏤᎭ ᏕᎯᎦᏘᎴᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ?  ᏥᎪ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏢᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᏪᏎᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏍᏋᏁᎸ ᎢᏍᏉᏢᏅ?
060920.english: Nay but, O man, who art thou that repliest against God? Shall the thing formed say to him that formed it, Why hast thou made me thus?
060920.phonetic: A-se-no ni-hi yv-wi-quo ga-go i-tsa-s-di tsi-ne-tse-ha de-hi-ga-ti-le-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi?  Tsi-go go-hu-s-di a-tlv-nv-hi hi-a nv-da-ga-we-se-li na-s-gi u-wo-tlv-nv-hi, Ga-do-no na-s-gi hi-a ni-s-quv-ne-lv i-s-quo-tlv-nv?

060921.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏗᏩᎵ ᏗᎪᏢᏍᎩ ᏳᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᏓᏆᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎦᎾᏆᎸᏒ ᎠᎬᎭᎸᏛ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎤᏬᏢᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ?
060921.english: Hath not the potter power over the clay, of the same lump to make one vessel unto honour, and another unto dishonour?
060921.phonetic: Tla-s-go di-wa-li di-go-tlv-s-gi yu-ha a-da-nv-te-s-gv i-yu-wa-ne-li-da-s-di-yi ga-da-qua-la, na-s-gi-quo ga-na-qua-lv-sv a-gv-ha-lv-dv sa-quo a-te-li-do u-wo-tlv-di-yi ga-lv-quo-do-di, nv-wa-da-le-no ga-lv-quo-do-di ni-ge-sv-na?

060922.cherokee: [ᎦᏙᏃ ᏳᏍᏗ,] ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ, ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏱᏚᏪᎵᏎᎸ ᏗᏖᎵᏙ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏟᏍᏗ, ᏗᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏗᏛᏙᏗᏱ;
060922.english: What if God, willing to shew his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much longsuffering the vessels of wrath fitted to destruction:
060922.phonetic: [Ga-do-no yu-s-di,] i-yu-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-du-li-s-gv gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-li-ni-gv-gv u-na-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi, gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv gv-di-s-gv go-hi-di-yu u-ne-la-gi yi-du-we-li-se-lv di-te-li-do u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv di-tli-s-di, di-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi di-dv-do-di-yi;

060923.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ] ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏕᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᏖᎵᏙ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏟᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᏂᎨᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏭᎾᏕᏗᏱ,
060923.english: And that he might make known the riches of his glory on the vessels of mercy, which he had afore prepared unto glory,
060923.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi [u-du-li-s-gv] gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi u-tse-li u-tsa-ta-nv-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv de-gv-di-s-gv di-te-li-do u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv di-tli-s-di, na-s-gi tsu-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-ni-ge-se ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ge-sv wu-na-de-di-yi,

060924.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ, ᎢᎩᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏉ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ;
060924.english: Even us, whom he hath called, not of the Jews only, but also of the Gentiles?
060924.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-yv, i-gi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi, v-tla A-ni-tsu-si-quo u-nv-sv a-ne-hv-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i;

060925.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪ ᎰᏏᎠ ᎤᏬᏪᎸᎢ; ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏥᏲᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ (ᏥᏲᏎᎮᏍᏗ,) ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
060925.english: As he saith also in Osee, I will call them my people, which were not my people; and her beloved, which was not beloved.
060925.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we Ho-si-a u-wo-we-lv-i; di-qua-tse-li yv-wi ga-tsi-yo-se-he-s-di na-s-gi na di-qua-tse-li yv-wi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi; a-le tsi-ge-yu-i (tsi-yo-se-he-s-di,) na-s-gi na tsi-ge-yu-i ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi.

060926.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ, ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎸᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᏱᎩ; ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎨᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ.
060926.english: And it shall come to pass, that in the place where it was said unto them, Ye are not my people; there shall they be called the children of the living God.
060926.phonetic: A-le hi-a nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni, na-hna-ni hi-a ni-ge-tsi-we-se-lv-i, Ni-hi v-tla a-yv di-qua-tse-li yv-wi yi-gi; Na-hna-ni gv-ni-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi ge-go-se-he-s-di.

060927.cherokee: ᎢᏌᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏕᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏃᏳ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎦᎳᎨᏴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᏄᎾᏧᏈᏍᏗ, ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎯᏴᎯ ᎠᏎ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
060927.english: Esaias also crieth concerning Israel, Though the number of the children of Israel be as the sand of the sea, a remnant shall be saved:
060927.phonetic: I-sa-ya na-s-quo hi-a ni-ga-we-ha I-si-li de-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-i; I-si-li tsu-we-tsi na-s-quo no-yu a-me-quo-hi ga-la-ge-yv na-s-gi-ya yi-nu-na-tsu-qui-s-di, u-na-li-no-hi-yv-hi a-se ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

060928.cherokee: ᏛᏍᏆᏗᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎬᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᏛᏁᎵ; ᎤᎵᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᏅᏛᏛᏁᎵ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏭᎪᏔᏅ ᎡᎶᎯ.
060928.english: For he will finish the work, and cut it short in righteousness: because a short work will the Lord make upon the earth.
060928.phonetic: Dv-s-qua-di-ye-no di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le du-yu-go-dv gv-di u-li-s-di-yu na-s-gi nv-dv-dv-ne-li; u-li-s-di-ye-no nv-dv-dv-ne-li nu-s-dv du-wu-go-ta-nv e-lo-hi.

060929.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏌᏯ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏐᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᏘᎾᎢ ᏂᎩᏃᎯᏰᎸᎾ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎤᎵᏃᎯᏴᎯ, ᏐᏓᎻᏉ ᏱᏗᏓᏤᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎹᎵ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᏂᎦᏍᏕᎢ.
060929.english: And as Esaias said before, Except the Lord of Sabaoth had left us a seed, we had been as Sodoma, and been made like unto Gomorrha.
060929.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi-ya I-sa-ya ga-yu-la hi-a tsi-nu-we-so-i, i-yu-no Yi-ho-wa u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-da-ti-na-i ni-gi-no-hi-ye-lv-na yi-ge-se u-li-no-hi-yv-hi, So-da-mi-quo yi-di-da-tse-le-i, a-le Go-ma-li nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya yi-ni-ga-s-de-i.

060930.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᏙ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ?  ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏂᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᎲ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ.
060930.english: What shall we say then? That the Gentiles, which followed not after righteousness, have attained to righteousness, even the righteousness which is of faith.
060930.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di ga-do da-da-dv-ni?  Na-s-gi na tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, na-s-gi a-du-da-le-s-di ge-sv nu-ni-s-da-wa-dv-sv-na ge-sv, na-s-gi a-du-da-le-s-di ge-sv u-ni-wa-dv-hv, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-du-da-le-s-do-di tsi-gi.

060931.cherokee: ᎢᏏᎵᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏩᏛᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᏩᏛᎲ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060931.english: But Israel, which followed after the law of righteousness, hath not attained to the law of righteousness.
060931.phonetic: I-si-li-s-gi-ni u-ni-s-da-wa-dv-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi v-tla yu-ni-wa-dv-hv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

060932.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ?  ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏅᏔᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏅᏔᏅᎢ; ᏚᏃᏕᏍᏔᏁᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᏯ ᏗᏓᏙᏕᎯᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ;
060932.english: Wherefore? Because they sought it not by faith, but as it were by the works of the law. For they stumbled at that stumblingstone;
060932.phonetic: Ga-do-no?  Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nu-nv-ta-nv-na ge-sv-i, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-s-gi-ni ni-ga-we-s-gv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv u-nv-ta-nv-i; du-no-de-s-ta-ne-ye-no na-s-gi na nv-ya di-da-do-de-hi-hi ge-sv-i;

060933.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎦᏪᎳ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏌᏯᏂ ᏓᏥᏂ ᏅᏯ ᏗᏓᏙᏕᎯᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏓᎿᎭᏍᏆᎶᏍᏗᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
060933.english: As it is written, Behold, I lay in Sion a stumblingstone and rock of offence: and whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed.
060933.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-ga-we-la, Gv-ni-yu-quo Sa-ya-ni da-tsi-ni nv-ya di-da-do-de-hi-hi, a-le nv-ya a-da-hna-s-qua-lo-s-di-s-gi; a-le gi-lo go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi v-tla u-de-ho-hi-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

061001.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎩᎾᏫᏱ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
061001.english: Brethren, my heart's desire and prayer to God for Israel is, that they might be saved.
061001.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, a-gi-na-wi-yi i-yv-dv a-qua-du-li-ha, a-le tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi I-si-li u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

061002.cherokee: ᎦᏥᏲᎢᏳᏓᏁᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎦᏙᎮᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏯᏅᏗᎭ.
061002.english: For I bear them record that they have a zeal of God, but not according to knowledge.
061002.phonetic: Ga-tsi-yo-i-yu-da-ne-hi-ye-no na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-na-du-li-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi go-hu-s-di u-na-dv-ne-di-yi; a-se-no v-tla a-ga-do-he-hi-s-di ge-sv ya-nv-di-ha.

061003.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏟᏂᎬᏁᎲ ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏧᎾᏓᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061003.english: For they being ignorant of God's righteousness, and going about to establish their own righteousness, have not submitted themselves unto the righteousness of God.
061003.phonetic: Na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na-ye-no ge-sv nu-s-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-na-tli-ni-gv-ne-hv u-ni-s-da-yi-di-s-di-yi u-nv-sv u-na-tse-li u-na-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i, v-tla tsu-na-da-yo-hi-se-lv-hi yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

061004.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎤᎬᏩᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ.
061004.english: For Christ is the end of the law for righteousness to every one that believeth.
061004.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no u-gv-wa-le Ga-lo-ne-dv u-na-du-da-le-s-do-di-yi na-ni-v a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi.

061005.cherokee: ᎼᏏᏰᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏩᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
061005.english: For Moses describeth the righteousness which is of the law, That the man which doeth those things shall live by them.
061005.phonetic: Mo-si-ye-no ka-no-he-ha nu-s-dv u-da-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha, Gi-lo yv-wi na-s-gi na-dv-ne-he-s-di gv-ni-dv a-wa-dv-di-s-ge-s-di.

061006.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᎾᏫᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎦᎪ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏓᏰᏏ?  (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎦᏠᎥᏙᏗᏱ;)
061006.english: But the righteousness which is of faith speaketh on this wise, Say not in thine heart, Who shall ascend into heaven? (that is, to bring Christ down from above:)
061006.phonetic: Go-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Tle-s-di tsa-na-wi-yi hi-a yi-ni-we-s-ge-s-di, Ga-go ga-lv-lo-i da-ye-si?  (na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ga-tlo-v-do-di-yi;)

061007.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎠᏍᏛᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏮᏓᎦᎶᏏ?  (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏧᎴᏙᏗᏱ;)
061007.english: Or, Who shall descend into the deep? (that is, to bring up Christ again from the dead.)
061007.phonetic: A-le ga-go a-s-dv-gi ge-sv wv-da-ga-lo-si?  (na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-yo-hu-sv tsu-le-do-di-yi;)

061008.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏙ ᎠᏗᎭ?  ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎮᎲ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᏄᏍᏗᏕᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎰᎵᏉ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎾᏫᏱᏉ ᎡᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏦᏣᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ;
061008.english: But what saith it? The word is nigh thee, even in thy mouth, and in thy heart: that is, the word of faith, which we preach;
061008.phonetic: A-se-no ga-do a-di-ha?  Ka-no-he-dv he-hv na-v-ni-yu nu-s-di-de-ga, na-s-gi hi-ho-li-quo, a-le tsa-na-wi-yi-quo e-ha; na-s-gi hi-a ka-no-he-dv go-hi-yu-di ge-sv ka-no-he-s-gi, na-s-gi a-yv tso-tsa-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga;

061009.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎯᎰᎵ ᏱᏨᏔᏅ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏂᏴᏁᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎾᏫᏱ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᎴᏔᏅ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᎡᏣᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061009.english: That if thou shalt confess with thy mouth the Lord Jesus, and shalt believe in thine heart that God hath raised him from the dead, thou shalt be saved.
061009.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-no hi-ho-li yi-tsv-ta-nv gv-ni-ge-sv yi-ni-yv-ne-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa, a-le tsa-na-wi-yi i-yv-dv yi-tso-hi-yu-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-le-ta-nv u-yo-hu-sv-i, a-se e-tsa-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

061010.cherokee: ᎣᎾᏫᏰᏃ ᎬᏗ ᎠᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎪ ᎣᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᎰᎵ ᎬᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎰ ᎥᏓᏗᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᎦ.
061010.english: For with the heart man believeth unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation.
061010.phonetic: O-na-wi-ye-no gv-di a-go-hi-yu-hv-s-go o-du-da-le-s-di ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-ga; a-le v-ho-li gv-di gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-ho v-da-di-s-de-lv-di ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-ga.

061011.cherokee: ᎪᏪᎵᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061011.english: For the scripture saith, Whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed.
061011.phonetic: Go-we-li-ye-no hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Gi-lo na-s-gi go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di v-tla u-de-ho-hi-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

061012.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏚᎾᏓᎴᎾᎠ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᏃ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏉᏰᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᏧᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎬᏩᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
061012.english: For there is no difference between the Jew and the Greek: for the same Lord over all is rich unto all that call upon him.
061012.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no yi-du-na-da-le-na-a A-ni-tsu-si a-no A-ni-go-i; na-s-gi-quo-ye-no U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-ni-v u-na-tse-li-ga u-tsa-ti u-we-hna-i-yu tsu-s-de-lv-di-yi na-ni-v gv-wa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi.

061013.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏉᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061013.english: For whosoever shall call upon the name of the Lord shall be saved.
061013.phonetic: Na-ni-v-quo-ye-no gi-lo a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di du-do-v U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ni-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

061014.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏯᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏏ ᎩᎶ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎡᎲᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏯᏃᎯᏳᎲᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎡᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎡᎲᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏯᎾᏛᎬᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎩ ᏄᏁᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ?
061014.english: How then shall they call on him in whom they have not believed? and how shall they believe in him of whom they have not heard? and how shall they hear without a preacher?
061014.phonetic: Ga-do-no yi-ga-li-s-do-da ya-na-da-do-li-s-da-si gi-lo nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na yi-gi e-hv-i?  a-le ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da ya-no-hi-yu-hv-ga gi-lo e-hv na-s-gi u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi e-hv-i?  a-le ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da ya-na-dv-gv-ga gi-lo a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gi nu-ne-hv-na yi-gi?

061015.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏯᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᎦ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎨᏥᏅᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ?  ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏂᏚᏬᏚᎭ ᏧᎾᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061015.english: And how shall they preach, except they be sent? as it is written, How beautiful are the feet of them that preach the gospel of peace, and bring glad tidings of good things!
061015.phonetic: A-le ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da ya-na-li-tsi-do-hv-ga i-yu-no ni-ge-tsi-nv-sv-na yi-gi?  na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, ni-du-wo-du-ha tsu-na-la-si-de-ni na-s-gi na o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gi, O-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gi na-s-gi o-s-dv u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i.

061016.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ.  ᎢᏌᏯᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᏱᎰᏩ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏅ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ?
061016.english: But they have not all obeyed the gospel. For Esaias saith, Lord, who hath believed our report?
061016.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla na-ni-v u-no-hi-yu-nv-hi yi-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv.  I-sa-ya-ye-no hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Yi-ho-wa, ga-go u-wo-hi-yu-nv o-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i?

061017.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏛᎪᏗᏱ ᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᏛᎪᏗᏱᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ.
061017.english: So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.
061017.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a tsi-nu-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-dv-go-di-yi di-da-le-hv-s-ga, a-dv-go-di-yi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li ka-no-he-dv di-da-le-hv-s-ga.

061018.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏳᎾᏛᎦᏅ?  ᎥᎥ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ, ᎤᎾᏓᏃᏴᎵᏍᏛ ᏚᏰᎵᏒ ᎡᎳᏂᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏚᏰᎵᏒ.
061018.english: But I say, Have they not heard? Yes verily, their sound went into all the earth, and their words unto the ends of the world.
061018.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, Tla-s-go yu-na-dv-ga-nv?  V-v, U-do-hi-yu-hi, u-na-da-no-yv-li-s-dv du-ye-li-sv e-la-ni-gv-i, a-le a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv e-lo-hi wa-s-dv i-yv-dv du-ye-li-sv.

061019.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏯᏂᎦᏔᎮ ᎢᏏᎵ?  ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎼᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎢᏣᏛᏳᎨᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᏨᏴᏁᎵ ᏓᎦᏥᏴᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᏃᏢᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎾᏓᏅᏛᎾ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏥᏴᏗᏍᎬ ᏓᏨᎾᎸᏍᏔᏂ.
061019.english: But I say, Did not Israel know? First Moses saith, I will provoke you to jealousy by them that are no people, and by a foolish nation I will anger you.
061019.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv ni-tsi-we-ha, Tla-s-go ya-ni-ga-ta-he I-si-li?  i-gv-yi ge-sv Mo-si hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, i-tsa-dv-yu-ge-di-yi nv-da-tsv-yv-ne-li da-ga-tsi-yv-ta-ni na-s-gi na a-ye-li u-no-tlv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le nu-na-da-nv-dv-na yv-wi ga-tsi-yv-di-s-gv da-tsv-na-lv-s-ta-ni.

061020.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏌᏯ ᏂᎦᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎬᎩᏩᏛᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏂᎬᎩᏲᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏋᏁᎸᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎾᏛᏛᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎥᎢ.
061020.english: But Esaias is very bold, and saith, I was found of them that sought me not; I was made manifest unto them that asked not after me.
061020.phonetic: A-se-no I-sa-ya ni-ga-na-ye-s-gv-na hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Gv-gi-wa-dv-hv-gi na-s-gi na ni-gv-gi-yo-lv-na ge-sv-i; gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-quv-ne-lv-gi a-ne-hv na-s-gi na na-na-dv-dv-hv-s-gv-na ge-sv ge-v-i.

061021.cherokee: ᎢᏏᎵᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏕᎦᏪᏎᎭ, ᎤᏙᏓᏆᏛ ᏓᏆᏎᎵᏛᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᏂᏍᎬ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎪᏁᎶᎯᏌᏘ ᏴᏫ.
061021.english: But to Israel he saith, All day long I have stretched forth my hands unto a disobedient and gainsaying people.
061021.phonetic: I-si-li-s-gi-ni hi-a ni-de-ga-we-se-ha, U-do-da-qua-dv da-qua-se-li-dv-gi ga-tsi-ya-ni-s-gv nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na a-le u-ni-go-ne-lo-hi-sa-ti yv-wi.

061101.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᎤᏁ ᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏚᏩᏁᎸ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ? ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ. ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᎢᏏᎵ, ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᏇᏂ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎨᎳ.
061101.english: I say then, Hath God cast away his people? God forbid. For I also am an Israelite, of the seed of Abraham, of the tribe of Benjamin.
061101.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, Tsi-go U-ne-la-nv-hi i-yv-dv ni-du-wa-ne-lv tsu-tse-li yv-wi?  Gv-wa-tli-s-di.  A-yv-ye-no na-s-quo tsi-i-si-li, E-qua-ha-mi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi, Que-ni a-ni-la-s-da-lv ge-la.

061102.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏱᏂᏚᏩᏁᎸ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏥᏂᏓᎦᏔᎰᎢ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎳᏯ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏔᏲᎯᎲ ᏕᎠᏡᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ,
061102.english: God hath not cast away his people which he foreknew. Wot ye not what the scripture saith of Elias? how he maketh intercession to God against Israel, saying,
061102.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi v-tla i-yv-dv yi-ni-du-wa-ne-lv tsu-tse-li yv-wi na-s-gi ga-yu-la tsi-ni-da-ga-ta-ho-i.  Tla-s-go yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha ni-ga-we-s-gv go-we-li na-hna I-la-ya a-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i?  na-s-gi a-ta-yo-hi-hv de-a-tlu-di-s-gv I-si-li hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv-i,

061103.cherokee: ᏱᎰᏩ, ᏕᏅᏂᎸ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏗᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᏚᏂᏲᏍᏔᏅ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏋᏒᎯᏳ ᎠᏆᎵᏃᎯᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎬᎩᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏲᎭ.
061103.english: Lord, they have killed thy prophets, and digged down thine altars; and I am left alone, and they seek my life.
061103.phonetic: Yi-ho-wa, de-nv-ni-lv di-tsa-tse-li a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le a-tsi-lv di-ge-la-s-di-yi di-tsa-tse-li du-ni-yo-s-ta-nv; a-le a-quv-sv-hi-yu a-qua-li-no-hi-yv, a-le a-yv gv-gi-hi-s-di-yi u-ni-yo-ha.

061104.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏙ ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᎵᏴᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ?  ᎬᏆᎵᏃᎯᏰᏗᏱ ᎾᏋᏁᎸ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᎾᎵᏂᏆᏅᏁᎸᎾ ᏇᎠᎵ.
061104.english: But what saith the answer of God unto him? I have reserved to myself seven thousand men, who have not bowed the knee to the image of Baal.
061104.phonetic: A-se-no ga-do a-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wo-hi-li-yv-s-da-ne-hv-i?  gv-qua-li-no-hi-ye-di-yi na-quv-ne-lv ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ga-yv-li i-ya-ni-dv a-ni-s-ga-ya na-s-gi ni-du-na-li-ni-qua-nv-ne-lv-na Que-a-li.

061105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎯᏴᎯ ᎠᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏔᏅ ᏚᏑᏰᏒᎢ.
061105.english: Even so then at this present time also there is a remnant according to the election of grace.
061105.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-no na-s-quo go-hi ge-sv-i u-na-li-no-hi-yv-hi a-ne-ha na-s-gi-ya gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv u-wa-ta-nv du-su-ye-sv-i.

061106.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ, ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎦᎩ.  ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ, ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎦᎩ.
061106.english: And if by grace, then is it no more of works: otherwise grace is no more grace. But if it be of works, then is it no more grace: otherwise work is no more work.
061106.phonetic: I-yu-no gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi yi-gi; hna-quo v-tla di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi yi-gi; i-yu-no na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di, gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv v-tla hna-quo gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv yi-ga-gi.  I-yu-s-gi-ni di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi yi-gi, hna-quo v-tla gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi yi-gi; i-yu-no na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di, di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv v-tla hna-quo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv yi-ga-gi.

061107.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ [ᏫᎬᏛᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ?] ᎢᏏᎵ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏩᏛᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏲᎲᎩ; ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᎲ, ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏃ ᏚᏂᎫᏏᏲᏨᎩ.
061107.english: What then? Israel hath not obtained that which he seeketh for; but the election hath obtained it, and the rest were blinded
061107.phonetic: Ga-do-no [wi-gv-dv-di ni-ga-li-s-di-ha?] I-si-li v-tla yu-wa-dv-hv na-s-gi tsu-yo-hv-gi; ge-ga-su-ye-dv-s-gi-ni ge-sv u-ni-wa-dv-hv, a-ni-so-i-no du-ni-gu-si-yo-tsv-gi.

061108.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏁᎸ ᎠᏓᎵᏔᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᎪᏩᏛᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎴᏂ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏛᎪᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ.
061108.english: (According as it is written, God hath given them the spirit of slumber, eyes that they should not see, and ears that they should not hear;) unto this day.
061108.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, U-ne-la-nv-hi du-ne-lv a-da-li-ta-di-s-gi a-da-nv-do, a-le di-ni-ga-do-li di-gv-wa-ni-go-wa-dv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na, a-le di-ni-le-ni di-gv-wa-na-dv-go-do-di ni-ge-sv-na, go-hi ge-sv i-ya-s-di.

061109.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᏫ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏍᎩᎸ ᎤᏁᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏌᏛᎥᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏃᏕᎯᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᏛᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᏫᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏏ;
061109.english: And David saith, Let their table be made a snare, and a trap, and a stumbling block, and a recompence unto them:
061109.phonetic: A-le De-wi hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, A-li-s-da-yv-di-yi u-ni-s-gi-lv u-ne-s-gi, a-le u-ni-sa-dv-v-s-gi, a-le tsu-no-de-hi-hi, a-le u-ni-s-dv-di-s-do-di wi-nu-na-li-s-da-si;

061110.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵ ᏫᏗᎨᎦᎵᏏᎲᏍᏓᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏚᎾᏗᏌᏓᏕᎨᏍᏗ.
061110.english: Let their eyes be darkened, that they may not see, and bow down their back always.
061110.phonetic: Di-ni-ga-do-li wi-di-ge-ga-li-si-hv-s-da-si, na-s-gi u-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le ni-go-hi-lv du-na-di-sa-da-de-ge-s-di.

061111.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᏚᏃᏕᎸ ᏰᎵ ᏧᏂᏅᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏎᎢ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏂᏅᏨ ᏄᏩᏂᏌᏅ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎸ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏛᏳᎨᏗᏱ ᎢᏳᏅᏂᏐᏗᏱ.
061111.english: I say then, Have they stumbled that they should fall? God forbid: but rather through their fall salvation is come unto the Gentiles, for to provoke them to jealousy.
061111.phonetic: Hi-a a-di-na ni-tsi-we-ha, Tsi-go du-no-de-lv ye-li tsu-ni-nv-i-s-di-yi a-ye-lv-se-i?  Gv-wa-tli-s-di; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni du-ni-nv-tsv nu-wa-ni-sa-nv a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-lv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, na-s-gi u-na-dv-yu-ge-di-yi i-yu-nv-ni-so-di-yi.

061112.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏂᏅᏨ ᎤᏁᏅᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏁᏅᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎧᎵᏨᎭ.
061112.english: Now if the fall of them be the riches of the world, and the diminishing of them the riches of the Gentiles; how much more their fullness?
061112.phonetic: I-yu-no na-s-gi du-ni-nv-tsv u-ne-nv-i-s-di-s-gi yi-gi e-lo-hi, a-le na-s-gi e-s-ga nu-na-li-s-da-ne-hv u-ne-nv-i-s-di-s-gi yi-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, ni-ga-v u-lo-sv-s-de-s-di a-ni-ka-li-tsv-ha.

061113.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏗᎭ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏥᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᏗᏱ, ᏥᎸᏉᏗᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎥᏆᏒᎦᎶᏛᎢ;
061113.english: For I speak to you Gentiles, inasmuch as I am the apostle of the Gentiles, I magnify mine office:
061113.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no i-tsv-wo-ne-di-ha di-tsa-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yv v-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi ga-tsi-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-di-yi, tsi-lv-quo-di-ha nu-s-dv v-qua-sv-ga-lo-dv-i;

061114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏋᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏟᏂᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᎩᏠᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎦᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
061114.english: If by any means I may provoke to emulation them which are my flesh, and might save some of them.
061114.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-no ye-li i-gv-qua-dv-ne-di yi-gi, na-s-gi i-ya-quv-ni-so-di-yi u-na-tli-ni-gv-ne-di-yi o-gi-tlo-yi ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi i-ga-dv ga-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

061115.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏐᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ ᎤᏃᎯᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᎨᎦᏓᏂᎸᏨᎭ, ᏚᏂᏲᎱᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᎾᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061115.english: For if the casting away of them be the reconciling of the world, what shall the receiving of them be, but life from the dead?
061115.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no na-s-gi ge-tsi-so-nv-i-s-ta-nv-i u-no-hi-s-da-ne-hi yi-ni-ga-li-s-di e-lo-hi, ga-do u-li-s-do-di ge-se-s-di de-ge-ga-da-ni-lv-tsv-ha, du-ni-yo-hu-sv-s-gi-ni du-na-le-hi-sa-nv ge-se-s-di.

061116.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎤᎬᏛᎾᏨᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ [ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ;] ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸᎢ.
061116.english: For if the firstfruit be holy, the lump is also holy: and if the root be holy, so are the branches.
061116.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no i-gv-yi-yi u-gv-dv-na-tsv-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu yi-gi, ni-ga-dv na-s-quo [ga-lv-quo-di-yu;] i-yu a-le du-hna-s-de-tlv ga-lv-quo-di-yu yi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo du-wa-ni-ga-lv-i.

061117.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏱᏗᎬᏂᎦᎴᏒ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᎾᎨ-ᎮᎯ ᎣᎵᏩ ᏡᎬ ᎾᎿᎭᏱᏫᏰᏣᏱᏢᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎶᏛ ᏱᏤᎳᏗᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎵᏦᏅ ᎣᎵᏩ ᏡᎬᎢ;
061117.english: And if some of the branches be broken off, and thou, being a wild olive tree, wert graffed in among them, and with them partakest of the root and fatness of the olive tree;
061117.phonetic: I-yu-no du-wa-ni-ga-lv i-ga-dv yi-di-gv-ni-ga-le-sv, ni-hi-no i-na-ge--he-hi o-li-wa tlu-gv na-hna yi-wi-ye-tsa-yi-tlv-ta-nv, a-le na-s-gi-ya u-na-li-s-de-lo-dv yi-tse-la-di-s-di yi-tsa-li-s-de-lv-di du-hna-s-de-tlv a-le ga-li-tso-nv o-li-wa tlu-gv-i;

061118.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏔᏢᏈᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸᎢ.  ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏯᏢᏈᏍᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᏂᎯ ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᏱᏘᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ, ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏣᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ.
061118.english: Boast not against the branches. But if thou boast, thou bearest not the root, but the root thee.
061118.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-ta-tlv-qui-se-he-s-di du-wa-ni-ga-lv-i.  I-yu-s-gi-ni ya-tlv-qui-s-ga, v-tla ni-hi du-hna-s-de-tlv yi-ti-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga, du-hna-s-de-tlv-s-gi-ni ni-hi ge-tsa-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga.

061119.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎨᎵ ᏅᏛᎯᏪᏏ, ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸ ᏚᏅᏂᎦᎸᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏋᏱᏢᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ.
061119.english: Thou wilt say then, The branches were broken off, that I might be graffed in.
061119.phonetic: Hi-a a-di-na ge-li nv-dv-hi-we-si, du-wa-ni-ga-lv du-nv-ni-ga-lv-hv-gi, Na-s-gi a-yv v-quv-yi-tlv-di-yi na-hna-ni.

061120.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ; ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᏕᎨᏥᏂᎦᎸᎲᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏙᎦ ᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏂᎬᏂᏏᎭ.  ᏞᏍᏗᏉ ᎤᏟ ᏱᏣᏤᎸᏎᏍᏗ, ᎯᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ;
061120.english: Well; because of unbelief they were broken off, and thou standest by faith. Be not highminded, but fear:
061120.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi; Nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi de-ge-tsi-ni-ga-lv-hv-gi; a-le ni-hi tsi-do-ga tso-hi-yu-sv ni-gv-ni-si-ha.  Tle-s-di-quo u-tli yi-tsa-tse-lv-se-s-di, hi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni;

061121.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏚᎨᏳᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏅᏁᎯᏯ ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᏣᎨᏳᏅᎾᏉ ᏱᎩ.
061121.english: For if God spared not the natural branches, take heed lest he also spare not thee.
061121.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-du-ge-yu-nv-na yi-gi nv-ne-hi-ya du-wa-ni-ga-lv-i, ni-hi na-s-quo ni-tsa-ge-yu-nv-na-quo yi-gi.

061122.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎭᎦᏌᏯᏍᏓ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᏂᏕᎬᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏂᏅᏨᎯ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏣᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎲᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏗᏗ ᏕᏣᏂᏴᏒ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏨᎾᎦᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061122.english: Behold therefore the goodness and severity of God: on them which fell, severity; but toward thee, goodness, if thou continue in his goodness: otherwise thou also shalt be cut off.
061122.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ha-ga-sa-ya-s-da u-da-nv-te-yu ge-sv a-le a-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi; a-s-da-yi-yu ni-de-gv-ne-hv na-s-gi na tsu-ni-nv-tsv-hi; ni-hi-s-gi-ni u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv tsa-na-nu-go-wi-se-hv-i; i-yu-no yi-nv-wa-s-di-di de-tsa-ni-yv-sv u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv-i; V-tla-ye-no na-s-gi ni-hi na-s-quo e-tsv-na-ga-le-s-di ge-se-s-di.

061123.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏗᎭᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎨᏥᏱᏢᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏗᎬᏩᏱᏢᏗ.
061123.english: And they also, if they abide not still in unbelief, shall be graffed in: for God is able to graff them in again.
061123.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi na na-s-quo, i-yu-no i-gv-wa-s-di-ha-quo ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv-i, ge-tsi-yi-tlv-di ge-se-s-di; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no ye-li-quo ta-li-ne di-gv-wa-yi-tlv-di.

061124.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎢᎾᎨ ᎡᎯᏯ ᎣᎵᏩ ᏡᎬ ᏨᏱᏢᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎮᎯᏯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎣᎵᏩ ᏡᎬ ᏰᏨᏱᏢᏅ, ᎤᏟᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎯᏘᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎯᏯ ᏥᎩ, ᎨᏥᏱᏢᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦᏯ ᎣᎵᏩ ᏡᎬᎢ.
061124.english: For if thou wert cut out of the olive tree which is wild by nature, and wert graffed contrary to nature into a good olive tree: how much more shall these, which be the natural branches, be graffed into their own olive tree?
061124.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no ni-hi i-na-ge e-hi-ya o-li-wa tlu-gv tsv-yi-tlv-nv-hi yi-gi, a-le na-hna he-hi-ya ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv o-s-dv o-li-wa tlu-gv ye-tsv-yi-tlv-nv, u-tli-hi-yu-s-gi-ni a-hi-ti-yu na-s-gi na na-hna a-ne-hi-ya tsi-gi, ge-tsi-yi-tlv-di na-hna u-nv-sv u-na-tse-li-ga-ya o-li-wa tlu-gv-i.

061125.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏯᏆᏚᎵ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, (ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎾᎢᏉᏰᏃ ᏱᏅᏣᎵᏍᏓ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ,) ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎫᏏᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎸ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎢᏏᎵ, ᎬᏂ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏴᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ,
061125.english: For I would not, brethren, that ye should be ignorant of this mystery, lest ye should be wise in your own conceits; that blindness in part is happened to Israel, until the fullness of the Gentiles be come in.
061125.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no ya-qua-du-li, i-da-li-nv-tli, ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi u-de-li-dv ge-sv-i, (i-tsi-ga-ta-na-i-quo-ye-no yi-nv-tsa-li-s-da i-tsv-sv i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-gv-i,) na-s-gi a-gu-si-yo-i-s-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-lv i-ga-dv I-si-li, gv-ni u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ni-yv-lv-hi ge-se-s-di,

061126.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏌᏯᏂ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᏗᎫᏓᎴᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏅᏓᎬᏁᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏂᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏈ ᎤᏪᎲᎢ.
061126.english: And so all Israel shall be saved: as it is written, There shall come out of Sion the Deliverer, and shall turn away ungodliness from Jacob:
061126.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni ni-ga-di-yu I-si-li ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di; Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Sa-ya-ni nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi da-ga-lu-tsi di-gu-da-le-s-gi, a-le i-yv-dv nv-da-gv-ne-li U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-ni-lv-quo-dv-na ge-sv i-ga-qui u-we-hv-i.

061127.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏕᎦᏥᏯᏠᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᏥᎥᎡᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
061127.english: For this is my covenant unto them, when I shall take away their sins.
061127.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi nu-s-di ka-no-he-dv de-ga-tsi-ya-tlo-i-s-da-ne-lv-i, na-hi-yu ga-tsi-v-e-di ni-ga-li-s-ta-nv-ha u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

061128.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎨᏥᏍᎦᎩ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᏓᏑᏰᏍᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎨᏥᎨᏳᎭ ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
061128.english: As concerning the gospel, they are enemies for your sakes: but as touching the election, they are beloved for the fathers' sakes.
061128.phonetic: O-s-dv-no ka-no-he-dv u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i, ge-tsi-s-ga-gi nu-na-li-s-ta-nv ni-hi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; da-su-ye-s-gv-s-gi-ni u-gv-wa-li, ge-tsi-ge-yu-ha a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

061129.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏝᏉ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏐᎢ.
061129.english: For the gifts and calling of God are without repentance.
061129.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-da-ne-di ge-sv a-le u-da-ya-nv-di ge-sv tla-quo u-ye-lv-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-so-i.

061130.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒ ᏁᏦᎢᏳᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏨᎯ ᎢᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ;
061130.english: For as ye in times past have not believed God, yet have now obtained mercy through their unbelief:
061130.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv ne-tso-i-yu-sv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-se-no go-hi e-tsi-do-li-tsv-hi i-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv-i;

061131.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏃᎯᏳᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
061131.english: Even so have these also now not believed, that through your mercy they also may obtain mercy.
061131.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo na-s-gi hi-a go-hi ge-sv v-tla yu-no-hi-yu-nv, na-s-gi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-tsa-tse-li i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi na-s-gi na-s-quo ge-tsi-do-li-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

061132.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᏭᎪᏔᏅ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏪᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
061132.english: For God hath concluded them all in unbelief, that he might have mercy upon all.
061132.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no du-wu-go-ta-nv ni-ga-di-yu nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ni-ga-di-yu tsu-we-do-li-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

061133.cherokee: ᎾᏎᏫᏂᏴ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏙᏌᏂᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎾᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ!  ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎬᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᎫᎪᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎪᎷᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ!
061133.english: O the depth of the riches both of the wisdom and knowledge of God! how unsearchable are his judgments, and his ways past finding out!
061133.phonetic: Na-se-wi-ni-yv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi a-ga-do-sa-ni-yu ge-sv a-le a-ga-ta-na-i-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi!  ni-ga-v-quo gv-go-li-ye-di ni-ge-sv-na nu-s-dv de-gu-go-di-s-gv-i, a-le u-we-da-s-di-yi ge-sv ga-go-lu-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na!

061134.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏰᏃ ᎤᎦᏙᎥᏐ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏛ ᏱᎰᏩ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎤᎾᏖᏆᎶᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎶᎢ?
061134.english: For who hath known the mind of the Lord? or who hath been his counseller?
061134.phonetic: Ga-go-ye-no u-ga-do-v-so nu-s-dv u-da-nv-dv Yi-ho-wa?  a-le ga-go u-na-te-qua-lo-no u-na-da-nv-te-lo-i?

061135.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᏚᏓᎴᏅᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏛᎠᎦᎫᏴᎡᎵ?
061135.english: Or who hath first given to him, and it shall be recompensed unto him again?
061135.phonetic: A-le ga-go du-da-le-nv-ta-nv u-ne-lv, a-le ta-li-ne dv-a-ga-gu-yv-e-li?

061136.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎳ; [ᎠᎴ] ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
061136.english: For of him, and through him, and to him, are all things: to whom be glory for ever. Amen.
061136.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv, a-le na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, a-le na-s-gi u-gv-wa-la; [a-le] na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di ni-go-hi-lv-i.  E-me-nv.

061201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏥᏰᎸ ᏗᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗᏱ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏗ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛᎾ, ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎬᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
061201.english: I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of God, that ye present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto God, which is your reasonable service.
061201.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-do-li-tsa-ti-yu ge-sv i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi di-tsi-ye-lv di-tsa-li-s-go-lv-do-di-yi gv-no-dv a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-di, go-hu-s-di nu-s-dv-na, di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi, de-tsa-da-nv-dv gv-di go-hu-s-di e-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i.

061202.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏱᏂᏨᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᏗᏣᏓᏁᏟᏴᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏤ ᎢᏗᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061202.english: And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what is that good, and acceptable, and perfect, will of God.
061202.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di e-lo-hi a-ne-hi nu-na-s-dv yi-ni-tsv-s-de-s-di; di-tsa-da-ne-tli-yv-dv-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di di-tse i-di-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-sv de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi ge-tsi-go-li-ye-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi o-s-dv ge-sv-i, a-le di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-ka-li-i ge-sv-i.

061203.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏥᏪᏎᎭ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᏥᎨᏣᏓᏑᏯ; ᏞᏍᏗᏉ ᏯᏂᎶᏒᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ, ᎤᎾᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏟᎶᎡᎸ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭᎢ.
061203.english: For I say, through the grace given unto me, to every man that is among you, not to think of himself more highly than he ought to think; but to think soberly, according as God hath dealt to every man the measure of faith.
061203.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya-ye-no u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gv, na-s-gi v-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, hi-a ni-ga-tsi-we-se-ha na-ni-v-quo tsi-ge-tsa-da-su-ya; tle-s-di-quo ya-ni-lo-sv-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv na-s-gi tsi-du-yu-go-di u-na-da-nv-te-di-yi, u-na-li-si-na-hi-s-di-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv go-hi-yu-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi du-tli-lo-e-lv a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha-i.

061204.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᏥᏕᎦᎯᏞᏫᏒ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎦᏛ ᏕᎦᎯᏞᏫᏒ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏔᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
061204.english: For as we have many members in one body, and all members have not the same office:
061204.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-ye-no tsi-de-ga-hi-tle-wi-sv sa-quo a-ye-lv ge-sv-i, a-le na-ga-dv de-ga-hi-tle-wi-sv u-tlo-yi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi go-hu-s-di gv-ta-ni-da-s-di ge-sv-i;

061205.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ, ᎢᎩᏣᏘ ᏥᎩ, ᏌᏉᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏂᏓᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏓᏁᎶᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᏗᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ.
061205.english: So we, being many, are one body in Christ, and every one members one of another.
061205.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv, i-gi-tsa-ti tsi-gi, sa-quo-quo a-ye-lv ni-da-li-s-di-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv de-da-ne-lo-dv-i, a-le ni-di-v i-di-si-yv-wi-ha i-ga-du-da-de-wi-sv.

061206.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᎿᎭᎢ ᎡᎩᏁᎸᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎦᏟᎶᎡᎸ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ [ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗ;]
061206.english: Having then gifts differing according to the grace that is given to us, whether prophecy, let us prophesy according to the proportion of faith;
061206.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsu-da-le-hna-i e-gi-ne-lv-nv-hi tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-gi-ne-lv-i, i-yu-no a-do-le-ho-hi-s-di yi-gi, na-s-gi-ya go-hi-yu-di ge-sv e-ga-tli-lo-e-lv i-dv-di-s-ge-s-di [i-da-do-le-ho-s-ge-s-di;]

061207.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏗᏯᏙᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᏗᏯᏙᎯᎲᏉ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏗᏕᏲᏗᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ;
061207.english: Or ministry, let us wait on our ministering: or he that teacheth, on teaching;
061207.phonetic: I-yu a-le i-di-ya-do-hi-he-s-di, i-di-ya-do-hi-hv-quo de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di; a-le gi-lo da-de-yo-hv-s-ge-s-di, di-de-yo-di-quo ge-sv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di;

061208.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏗᎦᏬᏁᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏗᎦᏬᏁᏙᏗᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏓᏯᏙᎮᎮᏍᏗ, ᏄᎨᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶ ᏣᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᎧᎵᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
061208.english: Or he that exhorteth, on exhortation: he that giveth, let him do it with simplicity; he that ruleth, with diligence; he that sheweth mercy, with cheerfulness.
061208.phonetic: A-le gi-lo di-ga-wo-ne-di-s-gi ge-se-s-di, di-ga-wo-ne-do-di-quo ge-sv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di; a-le gi-lo da-ya-do-he-he-s-di, nu-ge-yu-hv-s-gv-na na-s-gi na-dv-ne-he-s-di; gi-lo tsa-ga-ne-lo-di ge-se-s-di, o-s-dv u-ga-sa-ya-s-di ge-se-s-di; gi-lo a-da-do-li-ge-s-di, u-ka-li-s-di u-da-nv-dv na-s-gi na-dv-ne-he-s-di.

061209.cherokee: ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.  ᎢᏥᏂᏆᏘᎮᏍᏗ Ꮎ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏕᏥᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061209.english: Let love be without dissimulation. Abhor that which is evil; cleave to that which is good.
061209.phonetic: A-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv nu-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-se-s-di.  I-tsi-ni-qua-ti-he-s-di na u-yo ge-sv-i; de-tsi-ni-yv-se-s-di o-s-dv ge-sv-i.

061210.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᏧᎾᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ; ᏗᏓᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᏕᏣᏓᎬᏫᏳᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
061210.english: Be kindly affectioned one to another with brotherly love; in honour preferring one another;
061210.phonetic: A-na-li-nv-tli tsu-na-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv gv-di o-s-dv de-tsa-da-ge-yu-se-s-di; di-da-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv i-tsv-di-s-gv de-tsa-da-gv-wi-yu-di-s-ge-s-di.

061211.cherokee: ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏄᎸᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ; ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
061211.english: Not slothful in business; fervent in spirit; serving the Lord;
061211.phonetic: De-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv tle-s-di i-tsa-da-nu-lv-di yi-ge-se-s-di; u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di; go-hu-s-di e-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

061212.cherokee: ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ; ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ; ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ;
061212.english: Rejoicing in hope; patient in tribulation; continuing instant in prayer;
061212.phonetic: U-du-gi i-tsv-sv i-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di; di-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-se-s-di i-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i; i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di ni-go-hi-lv-i;

061213.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏂᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᏕᏥᏯᏙᎮᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏥᎦᎵᏱᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ.
061213.english: Distributing to the necessity of saints; given to hospitality.
061213.phonetic: U-na-da-nv-ti u-ni-ni-gv-se-hv de-tsi-ya-do-he-he-s-di; i-tsi-ga-li-yi-yu ge-se-s-di di-tsa-da-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi.

061214.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏥᏁᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎨᏨᎿᎭᏕᎩ; ᎣᏍᏛᏉ ᏕᏥᏁᏤᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏍᎩᏅᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
061214.english: Bless them which persecute you: bless, and curse not.
061214.phonetic: O-s-dv de-tsi-ne-tse-he-s-di u-yo i-ge-tsv-hna-de-gi; o-s-dv-quo de-tsi-ne-tse-he-s-di, a-le tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-s-gi-nv-di-s-ge-s-di.

061215.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎾᏠᏱᎯ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏕᏣᏠᏱᎮᏍᏗ.
061215.english: Rejoice with them that do rejoice, and weep with them that weep.
061215.phonetic: Na-s-gi na a-na-li-he-li-gi i-tsu-la-ha i-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di, a-le na-s-gi na di-na-tlo-yi-hi i-tsu-la-ha de-tsa-tlo-yi-he-s-di.

061216.cherokee: ᎤᏠᏱᎭᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ.  ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏕᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ.  ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᏱᏣᏓᏰᎸᏎᏍᏗ.
061216.english: Be of the same mind one toward another. Mind not high things, but condescend to men of low estate. Be not wise in your own conceits.
061216.phonetic: U-tlo-yi-ha-quo ge-se-s-di de-tsa-da-da-nv-te-s-gv-i.  Tle-s-di yi-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di go-hu-s-di ga-lv-quo-di ge-sv-i, de-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di-s-gi-ni u-na-da-do-li-s-di.  Tle-s-di i-tsi-ga-ta-na-i yi-tsa-da-ye-lv-se-s-di.

061217.cherokee: ᎤᏐᏅ ᏂᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏞᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏱᏁᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎢᎬᏱ ᏂᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
061217.english: Recompense to no man evil for evil. Provide things honest in the sight of all men.
061217.phonetic: U-so-nv ni-tsv-ne-he-s-di gi-lo tle-s-di yi-tsa-tle-ge-s-di u-so-nv yi-ne-tsv-ne-he-s-di.  I-gv-yi ni-tsa-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di o-s-dv i-tsa-dv-ne-li-da-s-di ge-sv ni-ga-dv a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i.

061218.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᎨᏣᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏙᎯᏱ ᎢᏣᏕᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ.
061218.english: If it be possible, as much as lieth in you, live peaceably with all men.
061218.phonetic: I-yu-no ye-li ge-se-s-di ni-ga-v i-ge-tsa-dv-ne-di ge-sv i-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-he-s-di do-hi-yi i-tsa-de-di-yi na-ni-v yv-wi.

061219.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏞᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᎳᏅᏓᏕᎮᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, ᎠᏞᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ; ᎠᏴ ᏓᎦᎫᏴᎯ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᏱᎰᏩ.
061219.english: Dearly beloved, avenge not yourselves, but rather give place unto wrath: for it is written, Vengeance is mine; I will repay, saith the Lord.
061219.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, tle-s-di yi-tsa-tle-ge-s-di, i-tsi-la-nv-da-de-he-s-di-s-gi-ni u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-la, A-tle-i-s-di ge-sv a-yv a-qua-tse-li-ga; a-yv da-ga-gu-yv-hi, a-di-ha Yi-ho-wa.

061220.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏣᏍᎦᎩ ᎠᎪᏄ ᎤᏲᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᏰᎶᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏔᏕᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᎤᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎿᎭᏛᏁᎲ ᏥᏃᏍᎦ ᏧᏥᏍᏟ ᏕᎯᏡᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ.
061220.english: Therefore if thine enemy hunger, feed him; if he thirst, give him drink: for in so doing thou shalt heap coals of fire on his head.
061220.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-yu-no tsa-s-ga-gi a-go-nu u-yo-si-s-ge-s-di, hi-ye-lo-he-s-di; i-yu-no u-ta-de-gi-s-ge-s-di, hi-u-v-s-ge-s-di; na-s-gi-ye-no hna-dv-ne-hv tsi-no-s-ga tsu-tsi-s-tli de-hi-tlu-s-ge-s-di a-s-go-li.

061221.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏁᏨᏁᎸ ᏱᏣᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᎴᏍᏗ, ᎤᏐᏅᏍᎩᏂ ᏁᏨᏁᎸ ᎯᏯᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᎮᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎿᎭᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
061221.english: Be not overcome of evil, but overcome evil with good.
061221.phonetic: Tle-s-di u-so-nv ne-tsv-ne-lv yi-tsa-da-li-ne-hi-de-le-s-di, u-so-nv-s-gi-ni ne-tsv-ne-lv hi-ya-da-li-ne-hi-de-he-s-di o-s-dv hna-dv-ne-hv-i.

061301.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᏚᏃᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏕᎪᏢᏩᏗᏒᎢ.  ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏳᏙᏢᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎠᏰᎵ ᏥᏕᎪᏢᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᏗᎪᏢᏅᎯ.
061301.english: Let every soul be subject unto the higher powers. For there is no power but of God: the powers that be are ordained of God.
061301.phonetic: Na-ni-v-quo du-no-hi-yu-se-s-di a-ye-li de-go-tlv-wa-di-sv-i.  V-tla-ye-no a-ye-li yu-do-tlv-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na; a-ye-li tsi-de-go-tlv-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-te-lv-hi di-go-tlv-nv-hi.

061302.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏓᎦᏘᎴᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎪᏢᏒᎢ, ᏓᎦᏘᎴᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏗᏂᎦᏘᎴᎩ ᏧᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏩᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
061302.english: Whosoever therefore resisteth the power, resisteth the ordinance of God: and they that resist shall receive to themselves damnation.
061302.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo da-ga-ti-le-ge-s-di a-ye-li go-tlv-sv-i, da-ga-ti-le-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-te-lv-hi go-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-no di-ni-ga-ti-le-gi tsu-na-du-go-da-ne-di-yi a-ni-wa-dv-di-s-ge-s-di.

061303.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏱᏙᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎤᏲᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᏙᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ.  ᏣᏚᎵᏍᎪᏃ ᏣᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎪᏢᏒᎢ?  ᎣᏍᏛ ᎿᎭᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏣᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061303.english: For rulers are not a terror to good works, but to the evil. Wilt thou then not be afraid of the power? do that which is good, and thou shalt have praise of the same:
061303.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi-ye-no v-tla di-ga-na-ye-hi-s-di yi-gi o-s-dv yi-do-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha, u-yo-s-gi-ni yi-do-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha.  Tsa-du-li-s-go-no tsa-na-ye-hi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na a-ye-li go-tlv-sv-i?  o-s-dv hna-dv-ne-he-s-di, na-s-gi-no tsa-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di.

061304.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ [ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ] ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ.  ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏲᏉ ᏙᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎯᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏎᏃ ᏱᎦᏁᎭ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᏞᎩ, ᎠᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏲ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
061304.english: For he is the minister of God to thee for good. But if thou do that which is evil, be afraid; for he beareth not the sword in vain: for he is the minister of God, a revenger to execute wrath upon him that doeth evil.
061304.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no [nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi] U-ne-la-nv-hi u-nv-si-da-s-di ni-hi o-s-dv i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi.  I-yu-s-gi-ni u-yo-quo do-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di, hi-s-ga-i-he-s-di; v-tla-ye-no a-se-no yi-ga-ne-ha a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-nv-si-da-s-di na-s-gi, u-tle-gi, a-s-dv-di-s-di-s-gi na-s-gi na u-yo tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi.

061305.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏓᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏦᏓᏅᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎣᏎᎮᎲ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
061305.english: Wherefore ye must needs be subject, not only for wrath, but also for conscience sake.
061305.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-se i-tso-hi-yu-di ge-se-s-di, v-tla u-da-s-dv-di-s-di-quo ge-sv i-yu-s-di, tso-da-nv-dv-s-gi-ni na-s-quo o-se-he-hv i-yu-s-di.

061306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎫᏴᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᎫᏱᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ.
061306.english: For for this cause pay ye tribute also: for they are God's ministers, attending continually upon this very thing.
061306.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di a-ye-li a-gu-yv-di ge-sv i-tsa-gu-yi-s-ge-s-di; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no tsu-nv-si-da-s-di na-s-gi, du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha ni-go-hi-lv na-s-gi hi-a.

061307.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᎫᏴᎡᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏰᎵ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏥᏃᏔᏅᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᎮᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎾᏰᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ.
061307.english: Render therefore to all their dues: tribute to whom tribute is due; custom to whom custom; fear to whom fear; honour to whom honour.
061307.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-ga-di-yu di-gu-yv-e-di ge-sv de-tsa-gu-yv-e-he-s-di; a-ye-li e-tsa-gu-yv-e-di ge-sv a-ye-li e-tsa-gu-yv-e-he-s-di; i-tsi-no-ta-nv-di-yi i-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv e-tsa-gu-yv-e-di ge-sv e-tsa-gu-yv-e-he-s-di; na-s-gi e-tsi-na-ye-i-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi na e-tsi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di; na-s-gi e-tsi-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv na-s-gi na e-tsi-lv-quo-de-s-di.

061308.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏥᏚᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ, ᏗᏣᏓᎨᏳᏗᏱ ᎤᏩᏒ; ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏳᎨᏳᎭ ᎤᎧᎵᎸ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
061308.english: Owe no man any thing, but to love one another: for he that loveth another hath fulfilled the law.
061308.phonetic: Tle-s-di gi-lo yi-tsi-du-ge-s-di go-hu-s-di, di-tsa-da-ge-yu-di-yi u-wa-sv; gi-lo-ye-no nv-wa-da-le yu-ge-yu-ha u-ka-li-lv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv-i.

061309.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ,] ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏲᏁᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏃᏍᎩᏒᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏣᏃᎮᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᎬᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠᏉ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᏙᏣᎸᏍᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᎳ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ.
061309.english: For this, Thou shalt not commit adultery, Thou shalt not kill, Thou shalt not steal, Thou shalt not bear false witness, Thou shalt not covet; and if there be any other commandment, it is briefly comprehended in this saying, namely, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.
061309.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi [di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di,] Tle-s-di tsa-da-yo-ne-lv-gi, tle-s-di tsa-da-lv-gi, Tle-s-di tsa-no-s-gi-sv-gi, Tle-s-di ga-ye-go-gi tsa-no-he-lv-gi, Tle-s-di go-hu-s-di yi-tsa-gv-v-s-ge-s-di, a-le ni-ga-v nv-wa-da-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, hi-a-quo i-ga-we-dv tsi-gi na-hna a-do-tsa-lv-s-ga u-s-qua-la ka-ne-i-s-di ge-sv-i, Tsv-sv ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv na-s-gi-ya ni-ge-yu-se-s-di na-v i-di-s-da-da-la.

061310.cherokee: ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏲ ᏱᏄᏩᏁᎰ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᎳ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎧᎵᎢᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
061310.english: Love worketh no ill to his neighbour: therefore love is the fulfilling of the law.
061310.phonetic: A-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv v-tla u-yo yi-nu-wa-ne-ho na-v i-yu-na-da-la; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv a-ka-li-i-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv-i.

061311.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᏥᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᎵᏱᎵᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏰᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏗᎵᎲ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎸ; ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎡᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎠᏃ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏗᎪᎯᏳᏅᎢ.
061311.english: And that, knowing the time, that now it is high time to awake out of sleep: for now is our salvation nearer than when we believed.
061311.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi, tsi-di-ga-ta-ha i-yv-dv a-li-yi-li-sv-i, na-s-gi na-hi-yu a-ye-i-s-di-yi i-di-li-hv hna-quo u-li-ye-i-lo-lv; go-hi-ye-no e-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi ge-sv u-tli na-v-ni-yu a-no i-gv-yi-yi di-go-hi-yu-nv-i.

061312.cherokee: ᏒᏃᏱ ᎠᏍᏆᎶᎦ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎩᏨᏂᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏛᎦ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᏄᏬᏍᏓ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏛ ᎡᎯ.
061312.english: The night is far spent, the day is at hand: let us therefore cast off the works of darkness, and let us put on the armour of light.
061312.phonetic: Sv-no-yi a-s-qua-lo-ga, hna-quo u-gi-tsv-ni-di; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yv-dv ni-dv-ga u-li-si-gv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le i-da-nu-wo-s-da a-li-s-ga-s-do-do i-ga--ga-dv e-hi.

061313.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏕᎲᎢ, ᎢᎦ ᏂᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎥᏝᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᎾᏩᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏃᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏛᏳᏤᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
